message:
perf(func): batch randomblob generation using 8-byte chunks

Replace per-byte random generation with chunk-based approach that
extracts all 8 bytes from each simple_random_i64() call via
to_ne_bytes(), reducing the number of RNG invocations by 8x for
large blobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
